questions.prompt: Put the four triage questions in the correct order.
items: Why was it blocked, category, threat, or list?
What fix does this ticket need?
questions.explanation: Each question gates the next one. Identify the domain, then the reason, then judge whether DNSFilter was right, then choose the fix.

questions.prompt: A user reports a block but the DNS Query Log default view shows nothing relevant. What's the cheap first move?
choices: Open a support ticket with DNSFilter
Widen the time range, the default is the last 15 minutes only
questions.explanation: The Query Log defaults to the last 15 minutes. Widening the range is the first thing to try, especially if the user's report came in slightly delayed.
